title: Derive bivariate cumulant map
summary: Derived the bivariate diagonal-noise SVAR cumulant map through fourth order and marked M05 done, with the result pending M06 adversarial audit.

user_inputs.text: Continue to the next project task, M05: derive the corrected bivariate cumulant map from scratch for u_t = B(a,b) epsilon_t + eta_t, including all second-, third-, and fourth-order cumulant equations and nuisance noise cumulants.

agent_actions.description: Created manuscript/derivations/bivariate-cumulant-map.md with the multilinear cumulant formula and all distinct second-, third-, and fourth-order cumulant equations.
Classified clean mixed cumulants separately from pure own nuisance noise cumulants and recorded profiled nuisance maps for nu_i, tau_i, and rho_i.
Updated the task board, dashboard, workplan, formal-object registry, session log, Codex log, and matching GitHub milestone.

checks.description: python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with only the expected open-milestone warning before M0007 closure
python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed after M0007 closure
